title: The Guest
description:
After leaving home behind, a young man finds shelter in an abandoned mansion hidden far from civilization.

What was supposed to be a temporary refuge soon becomes something far more complicated when he encounters a mysterious woman living within its walls.

As the days pass, strange events begin to unfold. The line between reality and illusion starts to blur, and the secrets hidden within the mansion gradually reveal themselves.

Through your choices, you will shape relationships, uncover hidden truths, and determine how the story ends.

Features:

• Choice-driven visual novel

• Multiple endings

• Character-focused storytelling

• Mystery and romance

• Secrets waiting to be uncovered
description_short: An atmospheric mystery visual novel where an unexpected guest arrives at your door. Make choices, uncover hidden secrets, and discover the truth behind a story filled with suspense, intrigue, and multiple possible outcomes.
